findings.evidence: `rg -n "re_smul_add_im_smul_I_eq_complex_smul" code mathlib/Mathlib` finds only its definition at line 148 and its single use at line 168 in `complexModule_ofComplexModule_smul`; no Mathlib/TauCeti downstream use was found.
findings.fix: Make this lemma `private`, or move/rename it into an appropriate general complex-module API file only if downstream code is expected to use it directly.
findings.issue: `re_smul_add_im_smul_I_eq_complex_smul` is a public generic complex-module decomposition lemma inside `AlmostComplexStructure`, but it is only used to prove the round-trip scalar-action theorem and is not part of the named correspondence API.

summary: The main correspondence API is present and the characteristic scalar-action lemmas are annotated, but the file also exposes a generic proof helper outside the intended almost-complex public surface.
